name: Wellspring Open 2017

venue.name: Ras Al Khaimah Academy
venue.address: 34B St - Ras al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates

information:
REMINDER:
FOR COUNTRY SELECTION, FOR UAE VISA RESIDENCE, KINDLY USE HOME COUNTRY AS YOUR
COUNTRY. DON'T USE OR REGISTER UNDER UNITED ARAB EMIRATES IF YOU ARE FROM OTHER
COUNTRIES, REGISTER THE COUNTRY MENTIONED IN YOUR PASSPORT. ONLY UAE LOCALS
WILL BE ALLOWED TO USE THE UAE AS THEIR COUNTRY.
E.g. If you're from INDIA please do not select UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
